author: Burgo
body: Yeah, there was a space after the “/”… think that’s fixed now, although I screwed up the rest of the sidebar… sigh, this is going to take a while to get used to :P

author: Meg
body: The one in the address bar is working nicely, but the one in the sidebar just has your blog url, not the feed address. Deep breath and one step at a time ;)
